component.name: AppImage Manager
component.summary: Lightweight utility to install and manage AppImages

description.p: AppImage Manager is a native tool designed for the KDE Plasma desktop to make handling AppImage files easier. It integrates directly into the Dolphin file manager and provides a centralized dashboard to view everything you have installed.

ul.li: Dolphin context menu integration for quick installation.
Drag-and-drop support into a centralized dashboard.
Extracts rich metadata, icons, and descriptions directly from the AppImages.
Clean uninstallation by automatically scanning for leftover cache and configuration files.
Built-in update system using zsync for efficient delta-patching.
Background download monitoring to notify you when new AppImages are downloaded.

screenshot.caption: Discover page for browsing and installing new AppImages
Drag-and-drop installation from the file manager

description.p: Modular discover sources. Dynamic sources configuration from Settings. Source-agnostic universal JSON feed support. Smooth drag-to-reorder AppImage source prioritization. Preferred installation method (AM script vs. direct download) dynamically determined by source order. Added a first-time user onboarding wizard with Applications folder setup and feature overview.

KirigamiAddons FormCard settings layout. KConfig XT settings backend. Process-wide icon store shared across engine instances. Dashboard delegate replaced with Controls.ItemDelegate for uniform selection highlight. Removed batch selection mode. Fixed persistent "Loading N…" label caused by synchronous cache hits racing against pendingLoads assignment. Removed StorageDialog. Drag icon visual improved in manage window.

Settings redesigned with card-based layout. New About dialog with contributor list and library versions. Accent border toggle. Sandbox detection for Flatpak/Snap environments. Nine new translations (cs, ja, pl, pt_BR, ru, sk, tr, uk, zh_CN). Atomic update swap with crash recovery. Concurrent icon rendering with split read/write locks. Background update timer now correctly skips when frequency is set to Never.
Async file hashing for update checks. HTTP fallback when zsync2 is absent. Localized AppImage descriptions. Releases atom feed failover.
AppImage update system via zsync delta-patching. Code cleanup and stability improvements.
